title: Freeze Block
description: A torch that blocks snow accumulation and water freezing in a large radius around it.
body:
Craft torches which prevent snow acculumation and water freezing in a large radius. (This works for preventing it from Serene Seasons winter, too.)

The recipe is shapeless - a single blaze powder, and at least one torch. The more torches you use, the more resulting torches you get, but the smaller radius they affect.

---

# What the torches look like

(The following screenshot still has snow/ice because it doesn't remove existing snow/ice beyond what a normal torch would - it only prevents *new* snow/ice, so that you can still handplace some in the affected area.)
![What each torch looks like (except the weakest one I accidentally broke before taking this picture).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/974e0702faca6fbd9703c0a84fdc8abc47b364d4.png)

---

# Range Example

All radius values are square, not circular.

(The following images are from before I fixed the block model, the previous image is what they look like in game.)

![The affected area for a radius of 8 (before I fixed the block model).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f34c7e562e12338f8ffbab8cfb0911dcf8cf405_0.webp)

![The affected area for a radius of 32 (before I fixed the block model).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0c9d19f645a06e964751adad56710c58391daaa_0.webp)
